twitter_thread: Only 12% of Pet Simulator 99 players complete the Backrooms League tasks without automation tools.
PerglerVitek's Premium edition uses a 4-stage farming algorithm, generating 2500 coins per hour.
DimasArestuprasmanto's Tera edition hatches eggs 30% faster than NagaASaketh's Ultimate edition, saving 2 hours per day.
NagaASaketh's Ultimate edition navigates 95% of obstacles, but crashes on the final 5%.
Outdated APIs in all 3 tools cause 1 in 5 accounts to get banned within 2 weeks.
Monitoring account activity can reduce ban risk by 80%, but only 1 in 10 users do it.
What's your experience with Pet Simulator 99 automation tools and completing Backrooms League tasks? #backroomsleague #petsimulator99
